agents.name: meta-orchestrator
agents.description: Coordinates all team agents and ensures comprehensive checks before approval
agents.argument-hint: Run full team review on code changes, PRs, or deployments

handoffs.label: Review Architecture
handoffs.prompt: Review this code for architecture and coding standards compliance

handoffs.label: Check Design Implementation
handoffs.prompt: Audit this implementation against the latest Replit design mockups for pixel-perfect accuracy

handoffs.label: Check Security
handoffs.prompt: Scan dependencies and code for security vulnerabilities

handoffs.label: Validate Compliance
handoffs.prompt: Run compliance and safety checks on this change

agents.name: metrics-data-integrity
agents.description: Enforces Macro Audit MDC rule for metrics, economic flows, and data pipelines affecting 5M vulnerable users. Blocks deployment until Critical findings resolved.
agents.argument-hint: Audit metric changes, run synthetic economy tests, validate data integrity, monitor post-deployment drift
responsibilities: Detect changes to canonical_metrics schema, ETL pipelines, or calculation logic
Automatically trigger Macro Audit for qualifying changes
Report metric drift and data integrity issues
Block deployment until Critical findings resolved
Track High findings and their mitigations
Maintain immutable audit log for compliance/incident response
Coordinate with external auditor for user-safety impacts
Execute revert protocol for post-deployment issues
trigger-rules: Changes to data pipeline (ETL, joins, filters)
Changes affecting user payouts or economic rankings
Any PR touching critical paths in workforce or GDP calculation

critical-findings.verification: Independent code review + synthetic re-run + test case proof + external auditor sign-off (if user-safety impact)
critical-findings.approver: You (solo) + External Auditor (quarterly reviews + user-safety impacts)

high-findings.rule: MUST have implemented mitigation before deployment
mitigation-examples: Real-time alerting that pages on-call if drift >threshold
Automatic rollback if metric drift exceeds threshold
Feature flag that disables affected metric until fix ships

required-for: Changes affecting user payouts or economic rankings
Changes to GDP or workforce metrics affecting policy decisions
external-auditor.responsibility: Sign-off on metric changes that impact 5M vulnerable users
external-auditor.frequency: On-demand for critical changes + quarterly full review
external-auditor.cost-model: Per-audit or retainer (recommend retainer for quarterly reviews)

normal-distribution.success-criteria: Metric values within expected range; no null/NaN values

extreme-values.description: Users with 0 income, 99th percentile income, edge cases
extreme-values.success-criteria: Metric handles extremes without overflow/underflow; no division by zero

temporal-edge-cases.description: Leap year, timezone boundaries, daylight saving time transitions
temporal-edge-cases.success-criteria: Time-series continuity maintained; no duplicate/missing records

rounding-edge-cases.description: Values that round up/down, aggregation rounding compounding

permission-boundaries.description: User sees own data, admin sees all, analyst sees anonymized cohorts
permission-boundaries.success-criteria: No data leakage; correct access control enforced

failover-scenarios.description: Data source down, fallback metric works, late-arriving data backfill
failover-scenarios.success-criteria: Fallback metric accurate; backfill logic preserves correctness

audit-checklist: Metric definition reviewed and documented (matches specification)
Synthetic-data test scenarios run (all 6 scenarios: normal, extreme, temporal, rounding, permission, failover)
Metric drift <0.01% confirmed across all scenarios
No null/NaN values in critical fields
Data pipeline end-to-end tested (source → transform → aggregation → user)
Permissions and access controls verified (no data leakage)
Downstream user impact assessed (how many users affected? what's the economic impact?)
External auditor sign-off obtained (if user-safety impact)
Revert protocol documented (how to revert if needed)
Audit log entry created and signed (immutable record)
blocking-criteria: Critical findings must be resolved and verified before deployment
High findings must have documented mitigation (already implemented, not planned) before deployment
Synthetic-data test must pass with <0.01% variance
External auditor must sign off on changes affecting user economic data
Audit log must be immutable and accessible to compliance

handoffs.label: Run Full Macro Audit
handoffs.description: Trigger complete audit for metric change
handoffs.prompt: This change affects metrics/economic flows. Run full Macro Audit MDC: detect trigger, create audit checklist, assign participants, run synthetic tests, report findings.

handoffs.label: Run Synthetic Tests
handoffs.prompt: Run synthetic-data economy simulation: 5M users with normal/extreme/temporal/rounding/permission/failover scenarios. Report metric drift, null/NaN values, aggregation correctness.

handoffs.label: Verify Critical Findings Fixed
handoffs.prompt: Verify that all Critical findings from the audit are resolved: independent code review, synthetic-data re-run, test case proof, external auditor sign-off (if needed).

handoffs.label: Assess Post-Deployment Drift
handoffs.prompt: Check for metric drift >0.01% in production. If detected, trigger revert protocol and incident response.

handoffs.label: Create Audit Retrospective
handoffs.description: Learn why audit missed a Critical finding
handoffs.prompt: Root cause analysis: Why did Macro Audit miss this Critical finding? What synthetic scenario should catch it? Update trigger rules and audit checklist.

handoffs.label: Escalate to Compliance-Safety
handoffs.condition: Changes affect user safety or legal risk
handoffs.prompt: Metrics audit complete. This change affects 5M users' economic data. Legal/compliance review required.

handoffs.label: Escalate to Testing-Release
handoffs.condition: Synthetic tests pass, ready for CI/CD
handoffs.prompt: Metrics audit passed. Synthetic tests show <0.01% drift. Ready for unit/integration tests and CI/CD pipeline.

handoffs.label: Escalate to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Macro Audit MDC complete. Findings: {critical: X, high: Y, medium: Z, low: W}. Synthetic tests passed. Awaiting human approval for deployment.

agents.name: design
agents.description: Manages Replit design submodule and ensures pixel-perfect UI implementation. See design.agent.md for design system context.
agents.argument-hint: Pull latest designs, implement mockups, or audit UI against design specs

handoffs.label: Update Submodule
handoffs.prompt: Pull the latest changes from the Replit design submodule and update the main repo pointer

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Design audit complete, returning results to orchestrator

agents.name: architecture-standards
agents.description: Enforces architecture and coding standards for quality and maintainability
agents.argument-hint: Review code for standards compliance, readability, and best practices

handoffs.label: Escalate to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Standards review complete, proceeding with full team review

agents.name: brand-voice
agents.description: Reviews user-facing copy and documentation for brand compliance
agents.argument-hint: Check UI copy, documentation, and content for brand voice compliance

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Brand voice review complete

agents.name: compliance-safety
agents.description: Enforces product safety, legal, and compliance constraints
agents.argument-hint: Validate compliance, legal requirements, and safety rules

handoffs.label: Escalate to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Compliance review complete, blocking or approving based on findings

agents.name: deployment-topology
agents.description: Manages deployment topology, environment builds, and routing configuration
agents.argument-hint: Validate deployment config, domain routing, and environment setup

handoffs.label: Check Environment Config
handoffs.prompt: Verify environment variables and secrets are correctly configured for this deployment

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Deployment topology validation complete

agents.name: environment-auth
agents.description: Manages environment variables, secrets, and authentication configuration
agents.argument-hint: Validate .env, secrets, and auth provider setup (Clerk, etc.)

handoffs.label: Return to Deployment Agent
handoffs.prompt: Environment configuration validated, returning to deployment review

agents.name: monorepo-boundary
agents.description: Enforces monorepo layout and prevents cross-boundary violations
agents.argument-hint: Check monorepo structure, boundaries, and modularity rules

handoffs.label: Escalate to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Monorepo boundary validation complete

agents.name: observability-incident
agents.description: Ensures Sentry and observability integration; monitors for incidents
agents.argument-hint: Check Sentry integration, logs, and error reporting

handoffs.label: Escalate Critical Issues
handoffs.prompt: Critical incident detected, escalating to orchestrator for human review

agents.name: plugin-lifecycle
agents.description: Manages plugin inventory, contracts, and feature lifecycle
agents.argument-hint: Review plugin schemas, access policies, and feature lifecycle

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Plugin and feature lifecycle review complete

agents.name: security-dependency
agents.description: Monitors dependencies for vulnerabilities and enforces security practices
agents.argument-hint: Scan dependencies, review code for security issues

handoffs.label: Escalate to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Security and dependency scan complete, blocking or approving based on findings

agents.name: testing-release
agents.description: Runs tests, enforces CI/CD rules, and validates release readiness
agents.argument-hint: Run tests, verify CI/CD pipeline, validate release readiness

handoffs.label: Final Approval
handoffs.prompt: All tests passed, requesting final orchestrator approval for release
